title: wedelia aspilioides
intro: Wedelia aspilioides, also known as Conyza, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Wedelia aspilioides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Wedelia aspilioides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
